Playwright end-to-end tests for browser-level player-web, runtime-api and portal launch binding flows.
cards-money-trains-mock.spec.ts: Browser acceptance for the complete test-only facilitator session, including keyboard board access and manual finish confirmation.
estate-race.spec.ts: Focused GSR-034 browser acceptance for the Estate Race board, hotseat actor switching, first purchase and first rent.
player-web.spec.ts: E2E coverage for normal Antarctica session boot, runtime action dispatch and portal launch session binding.
